name: tinh-luong-dev-operator
promotion_rule: promote lesson when repeated >= 3 times or when it reveals a high-value reusable pattern

versioning_rule.patch: small wording tweaks, minor lesson updates, low-impact rule clarifications
versioning_rule.minor: new rules, new workflow sections, promoted patterns, meaningful behavior expansion
versioning_rule.major: role change, architecture shift, lifecycle redesign, incompatible operating changes
